---
env:
  - WLJS
needsContainer: true
registered: true
origin: https://github.com/JerryI/wljs-html-support
---
```mathematica
SVGForm[expr_]
```
exports as `SVG` any Wolfram Expressions and plots it inside a cell.

import Notebook from '@site/src/components/wljs-notebook-react';
